ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of party (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the party */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the party */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the client belongs to */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the client was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the client was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_client_type FOREIGN KEY ("client_type") REFERENCES client_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_units" (
  "cost_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost unit */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the cost unit belongs to */,
  "cost_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost unit */,
  "cost_unit_type" TEXT /* Type of cost unit (e.g., unit, percentage) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the cost unit */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the cost unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_units_cost_unit_type FOREIGN KEY ("cost_unit_type") REFERENCES cost_unit_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., contract, agreement) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the document expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_documents_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_documents_document_type FOREIGN KEY ("document_type") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the client */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the client was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_client_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child) */,
  "relation_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_client_relations_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_client_relations_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_cost_unit_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "cost_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost unit */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., one-to-one, many-to-many) */,
  "relation_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_cost_unit_relations_cost_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_unit_id") REFERENCES cost_units ("cost_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_cost_unit_relations_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction after the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_documents_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document after the change */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document after the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_documents_history_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES client_documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user after the change */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user after the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "access_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access log being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access after the change */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access after the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_history_access_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_id") REFERENCES access_logs ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_client_relations_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship after the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_client_relations_history_relation_id FOREIGN KEY ("relation_id") REFERENCES party_client_relations ("relation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_cost_unit_relations_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship after the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_cost_unit_relations_history_relation_id FOREIGN KEY ("relation_id") REFERENCES client_cost_unit_relations ("relation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the client type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the client type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_unit_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost unit type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost unit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost unit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
